classes.Kernel-Authoritative: Deterministic simulation, state transitions, seed handling and kernel execution truth.
classes.Content-Authoritative: Authoritative gameplay content, rules and contracts consumed by the kernel.
classes.Reproduction/Evidence: Machine-readable proof artifacts, comparators and evidence contracts.
classes.Test/Gate-Core: Only the mandatory double-run gates that prove reproduction.
classes.Transitional: Active migration residue with planned removal.
classes.Deprecated: Superseded runtime or tooling path retained temporarily.
classes.Out-of-Scope: Present in repo but not part of kernel truth or mandatory quality gates.

domains.why: These files execute or constrain deterministic kernel truth directly.
Gameplay content and rule interpretation remain authoritative only here.
These files define and verify the machine-readable reproduction proof chain.
Only double-run tests that prove kernel or content reproduction remain mandatory.
Documentation, hygiene and planning truth that should stay synchronized with the reduced repo core.
These paths no longer participate in required quality proof.
Repository operations or process artifacts, not kernel truth.
